ha309d794g5486g439cg8effg546851df2d7f: I'll be - it's captain failure, in the flesh!
ha3c569bega9e7g4108g8affgd0fef5589bbc: I's there to see bruiser Spike turn your Flaming Pigs inside out. You bring more to slaughter?
h3e55728ag3fdcg4dd4g81adg1e9e10cd5f8d: *Your belly churns as you crash into memory. Spike was the one that slashed out your eye; this one held your head while he did it.*
h9e15c811g8b17g44dcg98fdge3f47266f36b: You value your life? Than tell me where to find Spike!
h8d16bb27g45dfg4accgaa5dgddcc7af59cce: Spike? Still roastin' corpses back at Greywaters. How many kids you left behind - fifty? A hundred?
hd60b5b13g105fg4a0cgb5b7g1a7d78e61be5: *The bile rises in your throat. You hate this cockroach, you hate his chief, you hate... yourself.*
h2f046e3bg570ag4bbfg881fgb3c47cfdc31e: *You'd been selfish, lazy, lustful. You'd all but invited the goblins to a slaughter.*
h3c42b45dg0a22g475cg99a7gff6f01176b07: Resist your anger and back down. Killing is no cure for grief.
haaf8c43bg288dg446ag930fga7600129d0c5: *The rage fades, leaving only guilt. You are no hero; You only play the part.*
h3e2c8affg24fdg4becgb9c8ge9a31fee2df5: Like I figgered. The tot-snot's soft as sheepskin.
hb63df02dg53cag4c4bgb27egf8b3488be4a7: I'll let you walk. Enjoyin' your snottering too much to kill ya.
h391e1818g9fd4g4d24ga968gba3454247d1b: Poor little sheep. Time to put ya out of your misery!
hefffc319gad27g4d76g981cg6918ea490966: *White heat seizes your mind. These butchers deserve no mercy.*
hbdd0a1c0g8943g40bbgbbd3ga3323273bcc1: Give in to your rage and deliver a merciless end.
h34e4e5c6g0d35g4f58gbb7egafc56394cb21: Attack. You can knock him out and question him.
h249ccd38g1a06g4f70gaca9g75ab9d01de3e: You value your life? Then take me to Mizora!
hed89feebg92afg4687g8bdag34303fb5b203: Lose someone? Try lookin' through the corpses back at Greywaters.
he24743c9g03f1g431cg9f53g3fd68c7c8a81: How many kids did you leave behind that day, Frontier-man? Fifty? A hundred?
h2a305efdg42f2g4d8cg9888g72cf0645ea52: They's still countin' corpses back in Greywaters. How many kids did you leave behind - fifty? A hundred?
ha05b232ege596g4a2dgbe09g20c96c45fd20: Spike is dead, you roach. And now I've come for you.
hc74aecc9g0ebbg4eedg864dgcb214ff59afb: Keep chirpin', birdie - it's music to my...
h94cf81c1gd176g439agbf27g5f0298b30cb3: Well I'll be - me ol' friend, captain failure!
h76a0849cg2f09g4f8ag8c16g1ab2b2a8fa11: Well I'll be - me ol' friend, captain failure!
h30365f48g4a65g4a6fg9252gcb9ff86fd6b3: You. Sing for me, roach. Tell me everything you know.
he80e04e9gb50eg4ef7ga473g579225288b93: Heh. I know you ain't seein' much out that eye-pebble of yours.
h879065a0g9e4cg4151g843bgd9019763fefb: If you won't tell the truth, then I will burn it from your shite-stained throat!
h26fd5fb6gc748g49fdg95ceg954e95e822b8: Look at that - the captain grew some bollocks!
